runTitle: GitLab Release Deploy Smoke - v8.12.95 RCA routing and observability release
coveredSurfaces: GitLab semver tag release pipeline v8.12.95 completed successfully (pipeline 2581156317, commit 7af581df10eb74737613f74d1631fa871d4be917)
Frontend production deploy job and post_deploy_smoke succeeded
AI Engine Cloud Run deploy job and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke succeeded
Vercel production / and /login smoke passed with expected version 8.12.95
Vercel /api/version returned version 8.12.95, releaseTag v8.12.95, commitSha 7af581df10eb74737613f74d1631fa871d4be917, pipelineUrl 2581156317
Vercel /api/health returned healthy for database, cache, and ai services
Cloud Run /health returned version 8.12.95 with supabase, upstash, groq, mistral, zai, cerebras, tavily, gemini, langfuse, and cloudRunApi configured
Cloud Run latestReadyRevision ai-engine-00595-lk4 receives 100% traffic
Cloud Run unauthenticated /monitoring returned authentication-required response as expected
Cloud Run live resource limits remained cpu=1 and memory=512Mi
Vercel usage checked after production deploy; no unexpected billed usage observed
skippedSurfaces: Full Playwright dashboard/modal walkthrough not repeated because the changed deployed surface was AI Engine RCA routing plus observability tooling
Conversational AI five-question QA not repeated in this smoke run; GitLab AI Engine smoke and Vercel health/version checks were the deployment gate

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab semver tag pipeline completed deploy and smoke for both Vercel frontend and Cloud Run AI Engine; live health/version checks matched v8.12.95.
Vercel /api/version, /api/health, Cloud Run /health, revision traffic, and usage/resource guardrails were verified after deploy.
The release includes RCA routing tests and implementation, and the deployed AI Engine reports v8.12.95 healthy.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked via vercel usage; effective=2.5854 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed usage observed after v8.12.95 deploy.
Cloud Run ai-engine stayed within free-tier guardrails: cpu=1, memory=512Mi, latest revision ai-engine-00595-lk4 at 100% traffic.
usageChecks.evidence: gcloud run services describe ai-engine --region asia-northeast1

artifacts.label: GitLab v8.12.95 release pipeline
artifacts.note: deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_smoke, and post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke succeeded

completedImprovements.title: RCA why/cause routing fix deployed to Cloud Run production in v8.12.95
completedImprovements.evidence: GitLab pipeline 2581156317 and Cloud Run /health version 8.12.95

completedImprovements.title: Langfuse latency fallback display fix released in v8.12.95

notes: Deployment path used canonical GitLab semver tag v8.12.95; no manual Cloud Run deploy fallback was used.
Root artifact push blocker was resolved by moving local screenshots to tmp/root-artifacts/2026-06-06 before pushing the release tag.
